title: Extension-side crypto module (WebCrypto mirror)
description: Create src/crypto.ts in the extension repo. Mirrors daemon crypto using WebCrypto API: X25519 key generation, ECDH deriveBits, PSK-authenticated HKDF, AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt. Must produce identical ciphertext/keys as daemon-side module for the same inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: generateKeyPair() returns X25519 CryptoKeyPair via WebCrypto
exportPublicKey(keyPair) returns base64-encoded raw 32-byte public key
deriveSessionKey(sharedBits, pskHex, extensionPubKeyB64, daemonPubKeyB64) returns CryptoKey
PSK-authenticated salt derivation uses HMAC-SHA256 via WebCrypto
All functions are async (WebCrypto is Promise-based)
computeFingerprint(publicKeyB64) returns first 16 hex chars of SHA-256
